name: # Pre-specified regions EXACTLY as used in the manuscript's regional-enrichment
# test (Supplementary Table S2, Panel A). Using these makes the locus-recovery
# benchmark directly comparable to Table S2, instead of the wider windows in
# workflow/config/regions.tsv (whose dj_cluster is 194 kb vs DJ_RC's 51.5 kb,
# and whose vcluster is 354 kb vs the manuscript's 250 kb).
# --- Negative controls (should show NO enrichment for a specific method) --
# NOTE: Rag1/Rag2 is NOT a negative control -- these are Rag1-/- cells and
# Rag2 transcription changes across the DN-to-DP transition in wild type.
